_comment: Reference data for the Cross-Lens Reconciliation Agent's fraud-signal check. NPIs not listed default to baseline risk (no flag). This is a deliberate rules-based stub for hackathon MVP scope, not a trained model.

1999999991.risk_reason: Billing volume 4.2x specialty peer average over trailing 90 days
